# src/tcpedit/CMakeLists.txt — libtcpedit + DLT plugins
# (mirrors src/tcpedit/Makefile.am and src/tcpedit/plugins/*/Makefile.am).

# tcpedit_stub.h — generated by autogen from tcpedit_stub.def, which pulls in
# tcpedit_opts.def and plugins/dlt_stub.def (which includes every plugin's
# *_opts.def).
file(GLOB DLT_PLUGIN_OPTS_DEFS ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/plugins/*/*_opts.def)
set(TCPEDIT_STUB_H ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/tcpedit_stub.h)
if(AUTOGEN_EXECUTABLE)
    add_custom_command(
        OUTPUT ${TCPEDIT_STUB_H}
        COMMAND ${AUTOGEN_EXECUTABLE}
                -L ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}
                -b tcpedit_stub
                ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/tcpedit_stub.def
        DEPENDS ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/tcpedit_stub.def
                ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/tcpedit_opts.def
                ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/plugins/dlt_stub.def
                ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/plugins/dlt_opts.def
                ${DLT_PLUGIN_OPTS_DEFS}
        WORKING_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}
        COMMENT "Generating tcpedit_stub.h with autogen")
else()
    # release tarballs ship a pre-generated copy
    set(TCPEDIT_STUB_H ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/tcpedit_stub.h)
endif()

set(TCPEDIT_SOURCES
    tcpedit.c parse_args.c edit_packet.c
    portmap.c dlt.c checksum.c incremental_checksum.c
    tcpedit_api.c fuzzing.c rewrite_sequence.c
    # plugins (see plugins/Makefile.am + per-plugin Makefile.am files)
    plugins/dlt_plugins.c
    plugins/ethernet.c
    plugins/dlt_utils.c
    plugins/dlt_en10mb/en10mb.c
    plugins/dlt_en10mb/en10mb_api.c
    plugins/dlt_hdlc/hdlc.c
    plugins/dlt_hdlc/hdlc_api.c
    plugins/dlt_user/user.c
    plugins/dlt_user/user_api.c
    plugins/dlt_raw/raw.c
    plugins/dlt_null/null.c
    plugins/dlt_loop/loop.c
    plugins/dlt_linuxsll/linuxsll.c
    plugins/dlt_linuxsll2/linuxsll2.c
    plugins/dlt_ieee80211/ieee80211.c
    plugins/dlt_ieee80211/ieee80211_hdr.c
    plugins/dlt_radiotap/radiotap.c
    plugins/dlt_jnpr_ether/jnpr_ether.c
    plugins/dlt_jnpr_ether/jnpr_ether_api.c
    plugins/dlt_pppserial/pppserial.c
    plugins/dlt_pppserial/pppserial_api.c)

add_library(tcpedit STATIC ${TCPEDIT_SOURCES} ${TCPEDIT_STUB_H})
target_include_directories(tcpedit PUBLIC
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}
    ${TCPR_GENERATED_INCLUDE_DIRS}
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/..
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/../common
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/plugins
    ${TCPR_SOURCE_INCLUDE_DIRS}
    ${PCAP_INCLUDE_DIR})
target_link_libraries(tcpedit PUBLIC opts)
if(LNAV_CFLAGS)
    target_compile_options(tcpedit PRIVATE ${LNAV_CFLAGS})
endif()
if(DNET_CFLAGS)
    target_compile_options(tcpedit PRIVATE ${DNET_CFLAGS})
endif()
